title: Luminous Depths
description: Venture into the Deep Dark biome, uncover hidden paths, and activate the Warden Portal to enter a new dimension filled with unique biomes, rare items, and powerful mobs. Discover the mysteries below!
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b88934d6d74db20cf4f77abe86ecbefacb44e2f.jpeg)

*GeckoLib is required





![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a2c599e55d5ea72cd5066eeb2cde99e8b1f2b5c.png)

**In this mod, venture deep into the Deep Dark biome, where ancient secrets and ominous creatures like the Sculky await. Uncover hidden pathways to activate the Warden Portal, leading you to a brand-new dimension filled with luminous landscapes, unique biomes, rare items, and formidable mobs. Prepare to brave the shadows and unearth the mysteries that lie below!**

 **Luminous Depths:** _A glowing underground realm filled with wonders and dangers._

Blulith Ore: A rare, glowing ore used to craft some of the most powerful tools and armor.

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a63e6539e2d80877c48644be7f711a48fdf5939.png)

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a2c599e55d5ea72cd5066eeb2cde99e8b1f2b5c.png)

Indigonium: Hard mineral that can be used to make purple bricks.

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d40019872cfd93dd997bc526ac2f4e09a511e8ff_0.webp)

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a2c599e55d5ea72cd5066eeb2cde99e8b1f2b5c.png)

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d6d6d967f21306cca5561e22d30bc8eb493287a.png)

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a2c599e55d5ea72cd5066eeb2cde99e8b1f2b5c.png)



Blulith Tools & Weapons: Harness the power of the new Blulith Ore to craft powerful tools, including the Blulith Pickaxe, Blulith Axe, Blulith Shovel, Blulith Sword, and Blulith Hoe.

Blulith Armor: Protect yourself with Blulith Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots.

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a2c599e55d5ea72cd5066eeb2cde99e8b1f2b5c.png)

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/167c994dcdf09bca3d25343de837006880e7ad29_0.webp)

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a2c599e55d5ea72cd5066eeb2cde99e8b1f2b5c.png)

_Uncover hidden secrets, fight new foes, and gather valuable resources in the Luminous Depths. Get ready for an adventure unlike any other!_
